utterances.speaker: Phoebe
utterances.text: Hey , Mel Gibson and Clint Eastwood .

utterances.speaker: Phoebe
utterances.text: Oh ... okay , I get the game now .

utterances.speaker: Joey
utterances.text: Okay look , look , let me ask you a question , when they were doing it on stage , was it like really hot ?

utterances.speaker: Joey
utterances.text: Well okay , so then you are fine .

utterances.speaker: Joey
utterances.text: The rule is when two actors are actually doing it off ... stage all the sexual tension between them is gone .

utterances.speaker: Joey
utterances.text: So as long as it is hot onstage you got nothing to worry about .

utterances.speaker: Joey
utterances.text: It is when the heat goes away , that is when you are in trouble .

emotion_cause.span: 10_It is when the heat goes away , that is when you are in trouble .

utterances.speaker: Joey
utterances.text: Look , you guys have been to every play I have ever been in , have I ever had chemistry on stage ?
